title: User Registration and Role-Based Login
description: Verify that user registration and login correctly assign and enforce roles (Admin, Instructor, Family) and direct users to respective dashboards.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Register as a new family user with valid credentials
Ensure registration is successful and family user is created
Log out and register as an instructor user
Verify instructor role is assigned and redirected to instructor dashboard
Attempt to login with admin credentials
Verify user lands on admin dashboard
Attempt login with invalid credentials
Confirm login is denied with an error message

title: Family Profile and Guardian Management
description: Test creating and updating family profiles and adding/editing/removing guardians, supporting multiple students per family.

steps.description: Login as family user
Navigate to family profile management
Create a new guardian profile with valid data
Ensure guardian profile is saved and visible in guardian list
Edit guardian details and save changes
Confirm changes are reflected correctly
Add multiple students under family and associate guardians
Verify students are linked and display correctly in family profile
Delete a guardian from family profile
Confirm guardian is removed without affecting student profiles

title: Student Enrollment and Belt Progression
description: Ensure students can be enrolled in programs/classes, belt progression tracking updates correctly, and attendance is reportable.

steps.description: Login as admin and create a new martial arts program
Program is successfully created and listed
Enroll an existing student into a class within the program
Enrollment status is confirmed and visible in student profile
As instructor, access student attendance page and mark attendance
Attendance records are saved and late arrivals flagged
Update student's belt progression and save
New belt status is displayed accurately in reports

title: Event Creation, Registration, and Waiver Signing
description: Validate event creation by admin, student registration process including digital waiver signing, and PDF generation/storage.

steps.description: Login as admin and create a new event with required details
Event appears correctly in listing and calendar views
Login as family and register a student for the event
Complete digital waiver signing process
Confirm waiver PDF is generated, saved, and associated with the student
Attempt to register for event without signing waiver
Registration is blocked, prompting waiver signing

title: Multi-Provider Payment Processing and Tax Calculation
description: Test payment processing workflows with Stripe and Square integration, including tax calculations, invoice creation, and webhook event handling.

steps.description: Initiate payment using Stripe with valid card details
Payment is processed successfully, and invoice is generated with tax included
Check webhook endpoint receives Stripe payment events correctly
System updates payment status based on webhook data
Initiate payment using Square Web SDK with valid details
Payment completes and invoice updates accordingly
Attempt payment with invalid card data
Payment is declined with meaningful error message

title: Invoice Management with Line Items and Payment History
description: Verify invoice creation, editing, line item management, PDF export, and payment history tracking accuracy.

steps.description: Create a new invoice with multiple line items for a family
Invoice accurately reflects all line items and totals
Edit an invoice line item and save changes
Updated values are correctly recalculated in the invoice
Generate PDF version of the invoice
PDF is generated correctly and downloadable
Record a payment against an invoice and verify payment history
Payment history updates reflect correct payment details and balances

title: Attendance Tracking and Reporting
description: Ensure instructors can record session attendance and late arrivals, and administrators can view accurate attendance reports for students and sessions.

steps.description: Login as instructor and open attendance session for a class
Mark students as present, late, or absent
Attendance data is saved with correct timestamps
Login as admin and navigate to attendance reporting
Reports display accurate attendance metrics and late arrival counts per student and session
Try to submit attendance with incomplete data
System prevents submission and displays validation errors

title: Two-Way Messaging System Functionality
description: Validate that families, instructors, and admins can send and receive messages with conversation threading, and messages are persisted correctly.

steps.description: Login as family and send message to instructor
Message appears in conversation thread for both sender and receiver
Login as instructor and reply to family message
Family receives reply and thread updates in real time
Check message order and timestamp accuracy for multi-message threads
Messages are displayed with correct chronological order and no loss

title: Calendar and Scheduling Views Accuracy
description: Check that event calendars render correctly in grid and list views, filters apply properly, and session scheduling reflects changes immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to calendar page as admin
Create multiple sessions with varied dates and times
Calendar grid and list views show all sessions correctly
Apply filters by program and instructor
Filtered sessions update calendar display accordingly
Edit a session's time and save changes
Calendar immediately reflects updated session time

title: Discount Codes and Automatic Discounts Application
description: Verify discount templates, codes, and automatic discounts apply properly during enrollment and checkout, including validation and expiry behaviors.

steps.description: Create a discount code with percentage off and expiry date
Discount code is saved and active
Apply discount code during student program enrollment payment
Discount is correctly calculated in payment total
Test automatic family discount applies when multiple students enrolled
Automatic discount adjusts price without manual code entry
Try applying expired discount code
System rejects expired code with appropriate feedback

title: E-Commerce Store Product and Order Management
description: Test product creation with variants, inventory updates, order placement, and order status management by families and admins.

steps.description: Login as admin and create a new product with multiple variants and inventory counts
Product and variants are listed correctly with accurate inventory
Login as family and add product variants to shopping cart
Complete purchase and submit order
Order is recorded with accurate details and inventory is updated
Cancel an order and verify inventory restoration
Inventory levels return to pre-order state

title: Push Notifications Subscription and Delivery
description: Validate the subscription to web push notifications, permission handling, sending, receiving, and reply functionality.

steps.description: Subscribe to push notifications and allow permission
Subscription details are saved and verified server-side
Trigger a push notification from admin panel
Notification appears on client devices correctly
Reply to a push notification message from client
Reply is received and logged in messaging system
Unsubscribe from push notifications
Push notifications are no longer received by client

title: Progressive Web App (PWA) Offline and Installation
description: Ensure service workers enable offline access, PWA installation prompts appear, and offline pages display appropriately.

steps.description: Visit app with network connected and trigger PWA install prompt
Install prompt displays and app can be installed
Go offline and navigate through app pages with cached content
Cached pages load without errors and show correct content
Attempt to access uncached page offline
Offline error boundary displays user-friendly message

title: Security Features: CSRF Protection, CSP Enforcement, and Role-Based Access
description: Test security mechanisms including CSRF token validation on forms, CSP headers with nonce enforcement, JWT role-based route restrictions, and resource-level security policies.

steps.description: Submit form requests without valid CSRF tokens
Server rejects requests with CSRF validation error
Inspect response headers for strict Content Security Policy with nonce values
Policy blocks inline scripts and unauthorized sources
Attempt to access Admin-only pages with Instructor role JWT
Access is denied with appropriate authorization error
Use JWT token with invalid signature
Token is rejected and user must re-authenticate

title: AI-Powered Database Chat Accuracy and Bulk Data Operations
description: Validate that natural language queries to the Google Gemini API perform correct database queries, and bulk operations on large datasets execute efficiently without errors.

steps.description: Input natural language query to fetch specific student attendance data
Chat returns accurate dataset matching the query
Input bulk update command to modify multiple student records
Bulk operation completes successfully with confirmation and no data corruption
Provide ambiguous or invalid input query
Chat provides meaningful error message or clarification request

title: Theme Switching and UI Component Rendering
description: Test dark/light theme toggling and verify UI components render consistently and accessibly in both modes.

steps.description: Toggle from light theme to dark theme using theme switcher
UI updates colors and styling across all components accordingly without layout issues
Navigate through various UI components including buttons, tables, dialogs, and forms
All components function correctly and remain accessible with appropriate contrast

title: System Logging and Error Monitoring
description: Verify that critical errors and unexpected behaviors are captured and reported in Sentry, and that logs provide sufficient context for debugging.

steps.description: Trigger a server-side error (e.g. throw exception in API route)
Error is logged and appears in Sentry dashboard with relevant context
Generate a client-side JavaScript error
Client error is reported to Sentry with stack trace
Simulate user input errors and verify error messages show without crashing
Errors are handled gracefully and system remains stable
